archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Brand - The Control Room

typography.guidelines: Do not exceed text-4xl for dashboard headers. Use JetBrains Mono for data numbers/KPI metrics to ensure tabular alignment and precision.

colors.guidelines: Use Night Green (#134219) for major structural elements like sidebars and primary buttons. Use Matte Goldenrod (#BA9149) for active states, key CTAs, and alerts. Ensure 4.5:1 contrast.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use tight spacing (p-4, p-6) for dashboard widgets. p-8 for main layout padding. Grid gap-4 or gap-6 for metrics.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-md (6px) for cards, buttons, and inputs. No heavy rounding to maintain an authoritative, technical feel.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: shadow-sm for cards. shadow-md for dropdowns/modals. Avoid heavy/soft shadows. Keep it crisp.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid border-gray-200 on cards and tables. For active elements, use border-[#134219].

components.buttons: Flat, no gradient. Primary: bg-[#134219] text-white hover:bg-[#0E3213]. Accent/Secondary: bg-[#BA9149] text-white hover:bg-[#A67F3B] or border border-[#BA9149] text-[#BA9149].
components.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), border border-gray-200, shadow-sm, padding p-6. No glassmorphism in dashboard.
components.tables: Dense rows. text-sm. Header uppercase text-xs tracking-wider text-gray-500 bg-gray-50. hover:bg-gray-50 on rows. Use standard pagination.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults customized with rounded-md and focus:ring-[#BA9149].
components.navigation: Sidebar: Fixed left, width 256px, bg-[#134219]. Active item text-[#BA9149] with subtle bg-[#ffffff]/10.
components.charts: Recharts. Use #134219 and #BA9149 for primary data series. Use #16A34A for positive metrics and #DC2626 for deductions.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons/links must have explicitly defined hover states. Table rows hover state is mandatory.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use fast, precise transitions. transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Skeleton loaders matching the shape of data. No spinners for full page loads.

icons_and_media.icon_style: weight='regular' for UI, weight='fill' for active sidebar items.

login_background.description: A bright green city bus navigating a street at night. Use as a split-screen background for the Login Screen with a semi-transparent black overlay.

driver_placeholder.description: Driver portrait placeholder for Driver Management screen.

bus_placeholder.description: Bus image placeholder for Bus Master Screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the layout with a fixed Sidebar on the left (bg-[#134219], text-white) and a top Header for user context.
Ensure the Dashboard uses a tight bento/control-room grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4) for KPIs (Total Buses, Active Drivers, Incidents, Energy Efficiency).
For tables (Tender, Bus Master, Drivers, Billing, Incidents), use Shadcn Table with sticky headers and pagination.
Implement the Deduction Engine logic exactly as specified. Base Payment = PK Rate * KM. Display calculations transparently in the Billing Screen.
Use Phosphor Icons for all side navigation and action buttons.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='sidebar-buses').
For the Live Operations tracking, implement a simulated map using a placeholder UI (e.g., a styled div with absolute positioned pins or a simple leaflet map).
Billing screen must have an 'Export as PDF/Excel' button (you can mock the export logic with a generic download function or alert).
